chunks: Impression kit shipping: After you order, your impression kit ships within 1–2 business days and typically arrives in 3–5 business days. You will receive a tracking link by email once it ships.
Aligner shipping: After you approve your treatment preview, your full set of custom aligners is manufactured and ships in about 3–4 weeks. Tracking is emailed when your aligners leave our lab.

Tracking your order: Use the tracking link in your shipping confirmation email. If the tracking has not updated for more than 3 business days, contact support with your order number and we will investigate with the carrier.
Lost or delayed packages: If your package is marked delivered but you did not receive it, or it is significantly delayed, contact support. We will file a carrier claim and reship if needed.
International and PO boxes: We currently ship within the United States. Some remote areas and PO boxes may add 1–2 business days to delivery estimates.
